testcase.name: test_tax_rates
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration53_advisor_os.py:311: in test_tax_rates assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_compliance_dashboard

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'compliance_score' in {'metrics': {'audit_logs_this_month': 0, 'average_compliance_score': 94.5, 'reviews_completed_mtd': 8, 'soas_generated_mtd': 12}, 'overview': {'action_required': 3, 'compliance_rate': 93.3, 'compliant': 42, 'total_clients': 45}, 'recent_activity': [{'action': 'SOA Generated', 'client': 'Emma Wilson', 'timestamp': '2026-03-16T23:41:49.511999'}, {'action': 'Compliance Check', 'client': 'David Lee', 'timestamp': '2026-03-16T20:41:49.512003'}, {'action': 'Document Signed', 'client': 'Lisa Chen', 'timestamp': '2026-03-16T01:41:49.512005'}], 'risk_alerts': [{'message': '3 clients due for annual review this week', 'severity': 'high'}, {'message': '2 SOAs pending client signature', 'severity': 'medium'}, {'message': '5 risk profiles due for reassessment next month', 'severity': 'low'}], ...}
